nasb.text: Jesus said to him, “On the other hand, it is written, ‘You shall not put the Lord your God to the test.’ ”

esv.text: Jesus said to him, “Again it is written, ‘You shall not put the Lord your God to the test.’”

cnv.text: 耶穌對他說：“經上又記著：‘不可試探主你的　神。’”

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“圣经上也说，‘不可试探主——你的上帝。’”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“经上又记着：‘不可试探主——你的神。’”
